subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This servant hath turned his face unto the Kingdom of Thy mercy, and hath placed his trust in the might of Thy single sovereignty, finding solace therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد توجه الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و توکل الی جبروت فردانیتک و استانس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
